summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Yu-Gi-Oh Card Creator new features: fullscreen card preview and collection pagination. All features working correctly.
passed_tests: Fullscreen card preview (3x resolution) - click canvas opens overlay
Fullscreen overlay close button and click-outside-to-close functionality
Collection pagination shows Previous/Next when total > 24 cards
Collection pagination hidden when total <= 24 cards (tested with 15 cards)
Backend GET /api/cards accepts skip and limit parameters correctly
Collection cards display with larger thumbnails
Collection filter and search work with pagination reset on filter change
Editor card renders correctly and PNG export dropdown works
Editor hint text 'Click card to view full resolution' visible
Collection to Editor navigation works correctly
All existing CRUD operations still functional
Page info displays correctly (Page X of Y)
Cards per page limit (24) enforced correctly
